technical_fit.notes: Content Creator role is outside Carlos's analyst/data focus. No mention of data, BI, analytics, or AI components. Role type completely misaligned with Data & Business Analyst positioning.

contextual_fit.notes: Location (Zürich) is correct. Language requirement is German (de), which is a significant barrier—Carlos is A2 level, not B2+. Internship contract type matches, but language creates friction.

opportunity_fit.notes: Internship format is appropriate. No details on duration or industry type. Chimpy (social platform) is accessible without clearance. Brand visibility low; growth potential unclear.

deal_breakers_found: Role is Content Creator, not Data/Business Analyst—pure career misalignment
German is listed as primary language requirement (de); Carlos is A2 and the role likely requires fluent German for content creation
key_match_points: Internship contract type matches Carlos's needs
red_flags: No job description provided—cannot assess actual responsibilities or data/analytics component
Content creation is not aligned with analytics/data analyst skill set
German language requirement vs. Carlos's A2 level creates significant barrier
top_jobs.suggested_angle: Not recommended unless Carlos is pivoting to content strategy/creation—otherwise, this is a category mismatch.
top_jobs.job_summary_for_user: Chimpy is seeking a Content Creator intern in Zürich. No job description is available, but the role title and German-only language requirement suggest this is a social media or content production position, not a data or business analytics internship. This appears misaligned with Carlos's Data Analyst profile.
